work: Akkadian glossary of RINAP (Royal Inscriptions of the Neo-Assyrian Period), ORACC / University of Pennsylvania
conversion: ORACC RINAP Akkadian glossary (oracc.museum.upenn.edu/rinap), CC BY-SA 3.0, via the committed lexicon of github.com/threedlite/classicsviewer; grouped by lemma with guide-word senses by scripts/import-akkadian.mjs. One Neo-Assyrian sub-corpus, not the full Akkadian lexicon.

entries.def: (a kind of clamp) (N); (the metal) lead (N); embrace (V)
(an exclamation used to express or to seek compassion) (J)
hang up (V); sing a joyful song (V); work song (N)
first and foremost (AJ); first and foremost one (N)
be(come) good (V); create (V); created (AJ); good (AJ); good one (N)
one who brings to conclusion (N); strong one (N)
be joyful (V); be(come) joyful (V); joy (N); joyful (AJ)
filled (up) (N); one who causes to go up (N)
one who appeases (N); one who pacifies (N)
one who erases (N); one who obliterates (N)
one who expands (N); one who makes wide (N)
one who destroys (N); one who disturbs (N)
one who causes someone to litigate (N)
one who makes someone bow down (N); one who makes someone submit (N)
one who delivers safely (N); that delivers safely (N)
one who cuts down (N); one who overthrows (N)
one who allows someone to attain something (N)
one who allows to rest (N); one who pacifies (N)
one who causes something to be dug (N)
one who considers (N); one who discusses (N)
one who prays much (N); pious (AJ); pious one (N)
one who brings abundance (N); one who provides lavishly (N)
one who makes pleasing (N); one who overthrows? (N); one who pleases (N)
attentive (AJ); attentive one (N); famous one (N); praised (AJ)
(a measure of capacity, mostly used for grain) (N)
be(come at rest) (V); be(come) at rest (V)
(an official representative of and commissioned by a higher authority) (N)
be(come) soft (V); endowed (AJ); set in place (V)
replacement (N); setting (of the sun or a star) (N)
cry out (V); heat up (V); light up (V)
armpit (N); be afraid (V); be(come) afraid (V); side (N); wash (off) (V)
(a part of the foot) (N); cultic 'summit building' (N)
cast away (V); fling (V); submerge oneself in (V)
(an)other (AJ); (an)other one (N); be(come) changed (V); do twice (V); second (AJ); second one (N)
be(come) high (V); give to drink (V); high (AJ); high one (N)
pen (for cattle, rarely for sheep and goats, horses) (N)
(a variety of oak tree and its wood) (N)
attention (N); compliance (with a god's or ruler's will) (N)
